sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array_filter (id UInt32, values Array(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_array_filter (id, values) VALUES (1, ['Hello', 'abc World', 'Goodbye']), (2, ['World hello', 'Programming']) ;
SELECT arrayFilter(x -> x LIKE '%World%', values) AS filtered_values FROM test_array_filter WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_array_filter SET values = arrayFilter(x -> x NOT LIKE '%Goodbye%', values) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arrayFilter((i, x) -> i % 2 = 0, arrayEnumerate(values), values) AS even_indexed_values FROM test_array_filter;
